title: Add idempotent continuation coverage for verify, commit, and terminal flows
goal: Add regression coverage proving that repeated resume of the same interrupted state does not corrupt verify, commit, or terminal lifecycle handling.
scope: Add tests for already-verified transaction resumed before commit.
Add tests for already-committed transaction resumed before terminal end.
Add tests for terminal transaction encountered again after completion.
Add tests that duplicate continuation does not corrupt transaction state.
out_of_scope: Broader interruption coverage already owned by p3-t01.
Documentation updates already owned by p3-t03.
expected_outputs: Idempotent continuation regression coverage for verify, commit, and terminal flows.
Evidence that duplicate continuation does not corrupt transaction state.
A test-to-plan traceability summary for idempotent continuation scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: Repeated resume of already-verified state does not corrupt lifecycle handling.
Repeated resume of already-committed state does not corrupt lifecycle handling.
Repeated encounter with terminal state does not reopen completed work as active work.
The resulting behavior matches the plan-defined idempotent continuation requirements.
